name: two-factor-auth
description: TOTP-based two-factor authentication. Generate secrets, create QR URIs, and verify tokens (RFC 6238).

issuer.description: App or service name shown in authenticator apps

onVerified.description: Fired when a token is verified

generateQrUri.description: Generate an otpauth:// URI for QR code

verifyToken.description: Verify a TOTP token against a secret
